# Security.Requirements property

Every numbered §28 requirement atom, in spec order — the single enumerable security baseline an implementation must address (spec R-28-a, and every R-28.x-y). Each atom id is used throughout the per-feature modules so a reviewer can trace an obligation to the code that enforces it.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<SecurityRequirement> Requirements { get; }
```
